task.title: Local syntax check of a local file from the z/OS Projects view
task.shortdesc: Follow these steps to do a local syntax check of a local file from the z/OS Projects view.

keywords.indexterm: local syntax checklocal file from z/OS Projects or Enterprise Projects view

taskbody.prereq: Before you check syntax locally, you must set local build options. You must do this action only once.

step.cmd: Select the file that contains the code you want to check.
Right-click and select Local Syntax Check or press Ctrl+Alt+L. The local compiler is started to perform the syntax check.
